category_sources: source_facts.description says Verovio is a command-line MEI music notation engraver; official site describes Verovio as a music notation engraving library.
display_name_sources: Official website and reference book use the Verovio name; source_facts.name is verovio.
docs_sources: Official Verovio Reference Book documents getting started and toolkit/command-line options.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already populated with https://github.com/rism-digital/verovio; per instruction, repo returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies MEI music notation engraving; official Verovio site mentions MEI, MusicXML, Humdrum, and toolkit support.
